mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'USER'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'USER' AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rest_logs WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'USER' AND status = 'active'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM places
status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE places SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM users WHERE role = 'USER' AND created_at >= #{startDate} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM rest_logs WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= #{startDate} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date

SELECT rt.type_name AS typeName, COUNT(rl.id) AS count FROM rest_logs rl INNER JOIN rest_types rt ON rl.rest_type_id = rt.id WHERE rl.deleted = 0 AND rl.created_at >= #{startDate} AND rl.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY rl.rest_type_id, rt.type_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE raw_region WHEN '서울특별시' THEN '서울' WHEN '부산광역시' THEN '부산' WHEN '인천광역시' THEN '인천' WHEN '대구광역시' THEN '대구' WHEN '광주광역시' THEN '광주' WHEN '대전광역시' THEN '대전' WHEN '울산광역시' THEN '울산' WHEN '세종특별자치시' THEN '세종' WHEN '경기도' THEN '경기' WHEN '강원도' THEN '강원' WHEN '강원특별자치도' THEN '강원' WHEN '충청북도' THEN '충북' WHEN '충청남도' THEN '충남' WHEN '전라북도' THEN '전북' WHEN '전북특별자치도' THEN '전북' WHEN '전라남도' THEN '전남' WHEN '경상북도' THEN '경북' WHEN '경상남도' THEN '경남' WHEN '제주특별자치도' THEN '제주' ELSE raw_region END AS region, SUM(cnt) AS count FROM ( SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(p.address, ' ', 1) AS raw_region, COUNT(DISTINCT rl.`쉼표번호`) AS cnt FROM rest_logs rl JOIN places p ON rl.place_id = p.id WHERE rl.deleted = 0 AND rl.place_id IS NOT NULL AND rl.created_at >= #{startDate} AND rl.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY raw_region ) t GROUP BY region ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'USER' AND created_at >= #{startDate} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT `쉼표번호`) FROM rest_logs WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= #{startDate} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT `쉼표번호` FROM rest_logs WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= #{startDate} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY `쉼표번호` HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ) t
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_logs (admin_쉼표번호, action, target_type, target_id, performed_at) VALUES (#{admin쉼표번호}, #{action}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{performedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_쉼표번호 AS admin쉼표번호, action, target_type, target_id, performed_at FROM audit_logs ORDER BY performed_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs
SELECT id, keyword, active FROM blocked_keywords ORDER BY id

SELECT ra.id, ra.activity_name AS activityName, ra.guide_content AS guideContent, ra.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, rt.type_name AS restType FROM rest_activities ra JOIN rest_types rt ON ra.rest_type_id = rt.id ORDER BY rt.type_name, ra.id

SELECT ra.id, ra.activity_name AS activityName, ra.guide_content AS guideContent, ra.duration_minutes AS durationMinutes, rt.type_name AS restType FROM rest_activities ra JOIN rest_types rt ON ra.rest_type_id = rt.id WHERE ra.id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM rest_types WHERE type_name = #{typeName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rest_activities (rest_type_id, activity_name, guide_content, duration_minutes) VALUES (#{restTypeId}, #{activityName}, #{guideContent}, #{durationMinutes})
mapper.select: SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
SELECT MIN(pt.id) AS id, pt.tag_name AS tagName, MIN(pt.rest_type) AS restType, COUNT(*) AS usageCount FROM place_tags pt GROUP BY pt.tag_name ORDER BY usageCount DESC, pt.tag_name
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_tags WHERE tag_name = (SELECT tagn FROM (SELECT tag_name AS tagn FROM place_tags WHERE id = #{id}) tmp)
